title: Why “wi vs nz” is trending in IN: 20,000+ searches, the facts (July 19, 2026)
description: “wi vs nz” is trending in IN with 20,000+ searches reported by Google. The verified coverage behind the spike, from Betfair and 2 more.

sources.title: WI vs NZ Cricket Scorecard, 3rd ODI at Providence, July 16, 2026
West Indies vs New Zealand: Jayden Lennox stars again as New Zealand take 2-1 lead

sections.heading: What is trending: “wi vs nz”
paragraphs: “wi vs nz” appeared on Google Trends' Trending Now list for IN (snapshot taken 2026-07-19T13:55:34+00:00 UTC). Google reports at least 20,000 searches for this term — that figure is a lower bound published in the official Trends feed, not an exact count.

sections.heading: What's behind the spike — the coverage
paragraphs: The Trends feed associates this search spike with 3 news stories from Betfair, Cricbuzz, Cricinfo. The headlines, exactly as published:
list: “WI vs NZ Cricket Scorecard, 3rd ODI at Providence, July 16, 2026” — Cricinfo
“West Indies vs New Zealand: Jayden Lennox stars again as New Zealand take 2-1 lead” — Cricbuzz
“West Indies v New Zealand Fourth ODI Tips: Kiwis to turn the screw” — Betfair

sections.heading: Timeline
paragraphs: The trend entry was published to the Google Trends feed at Sun, 19 Jul 2026 06:40:00 -0700. Our snapshot was taken at 2026-07-19T13:55:34+00:00 UTC and this briefing was assembled at 2026-07-19T13:55:41+00:00 UTC.

sections.heading: How to read these numbers
paragraphs: Google Trends reports approximate search volume as a lower bound (for example “20K+”). Actual volume can be significantly higher. Trending status reflects acceleration in searches, not the absolute size of a topic. For the full story behind the spike, read the cited coverage below — this briefing intentionally adds no speculation beyond the sourced facts.

faq.a: Google's Trending Now feed links the spike to coverage from Betfair, Cricbuzz, Cricinfo. The associated headlines are: “WI vs NZ Cricket Scorecard, 3rd ODI at Providence, July 16, 2026” (Cricinfo); “West Indies vs New Zealand: Jayden Lennox stars again as New Zealand take 2-1 lead” (Cricbuzz); “West Indies v New Zealand Fourth ODI Tips: Kiwis to turn the screw” (Betfair).

faq.q: How many people searched for “wi vs nz”?
faq.a: Google reports at least 20,000 searches in IN as of the feed snapshot. This is a published lower bound, not an exact count.
This snapshot covers IN. The same term may trend differently in other regions.
